description_long: This is a wooden chair with a rich, dark brown finish and a sturdy, rectangular seat. The backrest features a distinctive X-shaped cross-brace design, adding both structural support and visual interest. The chair has four straight legs, each with a slightly tapered profile, and the seat is flat and unupholstered. The backrest is tall and slightly curved at the top, providing ergonomic support for the user. Metal fasteners are visible at the joints, reinforcing the construction. The overall design is simple yet elegant, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings.
description: A dark brown wooden chair with an X-braced backrest and four straight legs, featuring a simple yet elegant design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat seat, tall backrest, and straight front and rear legs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the X-shaped cross-brace and visible metal fasteners on the backrest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the seat and backrest profile.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the seat, front legs, and the X-braced backrest design.
